# Weedtip

> Weedtip is a cannabis marketplace for the United States: find licensed
> dispensaries and delivery services near you, browse menus and deals, compare
> strains and brands, read reviews, and order for pickup or delivery. Users
> must be 21+ (or qualifying medical patients where permitted).

## Browse

- [Dispensaries](https://www.weedtip.com/dispensaries): map-first directory of licensed dispensaries across 40+ states, searchable by city or address
- [Deliveries](https://www.weedtip.com/deliveries): cannabis delivery services by area
- [Deals](https://www.weedtip.com/deals): live dispensary deals and promo codes
- [Products](https://www.weedtip.com/products): cannabis products by category (flower, vapes, edibles, concentrates, pre-rolls, tinctures, topicals, accessories)
- [Strains](https://www.weedtip.com/strains): strain library with effects, flavors, terpenes, and lineage
- [Brands](https://www.weedtip.com/brands): cannabis brand directory

## Learn

- [Learn hub](https://www.weedtip.com/learn): beginner guides on strain types, edible dosing, terpenes, and buying legally

## For businesses

- [Advertise](https://www.weedtip.com/advertise): featured and premium placement for dispensaries by region
- [Claim your listing](https://www.weedtip.com/claim): dispensary owners can claim and manage their storefront

## Notes

- Listing pages follow the pattern /dispensaries/{state}/{city} (e.g. /dispensaries/ca/los-angeles); each dispensary has a page at /dispensary/{slug}
- Content is informational; cannabis laws vary by state and purchases require age verification
